results.name: toll
results.description: Generate resources from your opponent's actions without them being able to pay it off.

results.name: tome
results.description: Providing incremental card advantage over time (usually by tapping to draw cards, although there are variants that [tutor](tutor), [impulsive draw](impulsive-draw), etc.) has been a staple effect for noncreature artifacts since the printing of Jayemdae Tome in Alpha.
